arts.ttl: Transfer News: Green Light for Cherki and BVB Look to Denmark for Left Back Reinforcements
arts.sum: A transfer target of this summer, Rayan Cherki, has been linked with Dortmund, and Kovac has seemingly already given the green light for the technically gifted Frenchman. Now it looks like something might finally happen, and the player in question is the 22-year old Swede, Daniel Svensson from FC Nordsjælland.

arts.ttl: Dortmund agree personal terms with Swedish international
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund have reached an agreement with Swedish international Daniel Svensson, who plays for Danish side FC Nordsjælland.

arts.ttl: Dortmund step up interest in Cherki
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are reportedly making progress in their bid to sign Rayan Cherki from Olympique Lyon, with new coach Niko Kovac having given the green light for the move.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund progressing in talks with Lyon’s Rayan Cherki as transfer deadline approaches
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano reports that Borussia Dortmund are progressing in their pursuit of Lyon forward Rayan Cherki as the transfer deadline approaches. The 21-year-old has already given the initial green light over…

arts.ttl: Lyon’s Rayan Cherki gives green light to join Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, Borussia Dortmund are progressing in their efforts to secure Rayan Cherki (21) from Olympique Lyonnais. The Frenchman who won a silver medal with…

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Can BVB Make it Two on the Bounce Against Heidenheim?
arts.sum: Going into this season, Pieringer was handed the absolute daunting task of following in the footsteps of Heidenheim superstart, Tim Kleindienst, who departed for Gladbach. Losing players like Jan-Niklas Beste and Tim Kleindienst is obviously a big blow, and one could even argue that it isn’t necessarily a good thing for Heidenheim to be playing in the Conference League—at least not if they want to secure a spot in the Bundesliga next season.

arts.ttl: Predicted Heidenheim v Borussia Dortmund XIs: Nico Schlotterbeck suspended, Waldemar Anton in
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund go in search of their first Bundesliga win of 2025 when they play at Heidenheim on Saturday, but they will have to do without central-defender Nico Schlotterbeck after…

arts.ttl: Niklas Beste: Who is the former Heidenheim maestro back in the Bundesliga with Freiburg?
arts.sum: An astonishing 12 goals and 13 assists saw Beste fire Heidenheim to a fairy-tale promotion, completing a rise from the regional leagues to the Bundesliga for the very first time. Heidenheim then signed Beste after finishing sixth in Bundesliga 2 under long-serving coach Frank Schmidt, and the rest is German football history!

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund’s Mike Tullberg welcomes Niko Kovac: “A new era begins.”
arts.sum: Mike Tullberg will take charge of his second Bundesliga game on Saturday when Borussia Dortmund play at Heidenheim. On Sunday, the interim coach will pass the baton to Niko Kovac,…

arts.ttl: USMNT Transfers: New twists in Ricardo Pepi saga at PSV, Gio Reyna continues to fight at Dortmund, Caleb Wiley on the move
arts.sum: The USMNT Transfer Notebook tracks American player movements, with latest developments for those in the U.S. national team pool We're just days away from the end of the transfer window and, at times, it looked as if sparks could fly in this final stretch.
